name: Orange-Pumpkin Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, mix gelatin with 1/4 cup sugar, nutmeg, cinnamon, and ginger.
2. Beat egg yolks with water; stir into the gelatin mixture.
3. Stir over low heat until the gelatin dissolves, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in orange juice, pumpkin, and orange peel until well blended.
5. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually beat in the remaining 1/4 cup sugar until stiff, glossy peaks form.
8. Fold into the pumpkin mixture, blending thoroughly.
9. Turn into prepared crust.
10. Chill until firm, at least 4 hours or overnight.
11. Garnish with whipped cream and halved orange slices.
12. Makes 8 servings.
